TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Rumen_Radev, title = Rumen_Radev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rumen_Radev} }

S.FORM: = Rumen Radev = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 6 jiyax 18 ka Rumen Radev ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bulgaria ta sayang o kiya ka Rumen Radev, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ɾumən ɾadə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾumən ɾadə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bulgaɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾumən ɾadə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Rumen Radev = Mntucing hngkawas 1963 idas 6 jiyax 18 ka Rumen Radev ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bulgaria ta sayang o kiya ka Rumen Radev, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 1 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ɾumən ɾadə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾumən ɾadə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bulgaɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾumən ɾadə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
